title: Manufacturing Engineer - Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive
company: Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates!
